[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 11010000 3
4 00000000 a
5 00000010 1
6 11001001 4
7 01001000 2
